candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; equals Net Sales in the preview and is the most direct total revenue line.
Also a valid top-line sales label; same values as Total Revenue and useful as an alternate label over time.

candidates.why: Direct match for cost of sales / COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

Balance sheet asset gross amount, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not current R&D expense.
Balancing line, not an R&D expense.

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.why: Supplemental subset of lease interest, not preferred over the main interest expense line.
